commands.review_summary:
The PR changes LLM idle-timeout precedence so explicit provider request timeouts still apply to no-timeout runs and explicit run timeouts are not re-bounded by agent defaults, with focused helper tests.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +39. Total +46 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source-level helper path: current main returns 0 for runTimeoutMs >= MAX_TIMER_TIMEOUT_MS before reading modelRequestTimeoutMs, so the proposed sentinel-plus-provider-timeout case would fail. I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Contributor or maintainer action is needed to supply or waive real behavior proof and accept the timeout-precedence upgrade risk; there is no narrow automation repair to make on the branch.
